settings.title: Settings
settings.exportCsvDesc: Download all your dividend and yield data across all years as a CSV file.
settings.dividendGoalDesc: Set a target for total dividend income this year. Your progress will be shown on the dashboard.
settings.yieldGoalDesc: Set a target for total yield income this year. Your progress will be shown on the dashboard.
settings.steuerfreibetragDesc: Your personal tax-free savings allowance (max. €2,000). Once your dividends exceed this, the chart turns amber.
settings.exportLocked: CSV export is a Monthly/Yearly feature
settings.exportLockedDesc: Upgrade to export your data as CSV.

login.tagline: Track your dividends and savings yields
login.title: Sign in

confirm.title: Confirm your email
confirm.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email address.

footer.tagline: Track dividends from stocks and savings yields from any bank — all in one place.
footer.disclaimerText: This app is for personal finance tracking only. Nothing here constitutes financial or investment advice.

subscriptions.title: Simple, transparent subscription plans
subscriptions.checkoutError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
subscriptions.successSub: Your subscription is active. All premium features are unlocked.

landing.heroTitle: Know exactly what your money earns.
landing.heroSub: Track dividends from stocks and savings yields from any bank — all in one place, beautifully organized.
landing.feature1Desc: Log dividend income by ticker, see monthly breakdowns across every stock in your portfolio.
landing.feature2Desc: Track savings account interest from any bank, organized month by month.
landing.feature3Desc: Monthly, quarterly, yearly, and cumulative charts — spot trends and see your income grow over time.
landing.feature4Desc: Set yearly targets for dividends and yields. Live donut charts show your progress at a glance.
landing.feature5Desc: Monitor your Steuerfreibetrag with a dedicated progress indicator that turns amber the moment you exceed it.
landing.feature6Desc: See exactly which tickers and savings accounts drive your income with an instant visual breakdown.
landing.feature7Desc: A heatmap grid showing every month across all years. Spot your strongest seasons and watch year-over-year growth at a glance.
landing.step1Desc: Enter your stock tickers and savings accounts once.
landing.step2Desc: Record amounts as dividends and yields arrive.
landing.step3Desc: Charts and tables update instantly to show your progress.
landing.ctaSub: Sign in and start building your dividend and yield history today.

cookie.message: We use only technically necessary storage for sign-in, preferences and session handling.

forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPassword.successSub: We sent a password reset code to your email address.

resetPassword.successToast: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.

upsell.analyticsTitle: Visual analytics are a Premium feature

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing or using the-yields, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.useBody: the-yields is provided for personal finance tracking purposes only. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.noAdviceBody: Nothing on the-yields constitutes financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. All data you enter and all charts or summaries displayed are for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified professional before making financial decisions.
terms.dataBody: Your data is stored securely and is never sold or shared with third parties. We use local storage and authentication tokens solely to provide core app functionality. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for full details.
terms.changesBody: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms. The date of the most recent revision will be noted at the top of this page.

legalMeta.updateIn: Update these details centrally in ui/src/legal.js.

legalNoticePage.title: Legal Notice
legalNoticePage.disputeBody: We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
legalNoticePage.odrNote: Note: the former EU Online Dispute Resolution platform was discontinued on July 20, 2025.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.hostingBody1: The application runs on a server provided by IONOS SE, Elgendorfer Str. 57, 56410 Montabaur, Germany. When you access the website or API, technical data such as IP address, timestamp, requested resource, browser type, operating system and referrer may be processed.
privacyPage.hostingBody2: This processing is necessary to deliver the service securely, analyse errors and defend against abuse and is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacyPage.accountTitle: 3. Account, authentication and use of the app
privacyPage.accountBody1: When you register or sign in, we process your email address, display name, confirmation and reset codes, and technical authentication data. Password handling is performed through Amazon Cognito; we do not store passwords in plain text.
privacyPage.accountBody2: To provide the app, we also process the financial entries, goals and settings you enter, including dividend data, yield data, yearly records and user preferences.
privacyPage.accountBody3: This processing is required to perform the user contract and to operate the service securely under Art. 6(1)(b) and Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacyPage.subscriptionBody1: We use Stripe for paid subscriptions. In that context, we process your email address, the selected plan, and technical identifiers such as Stripe customer and subscription IDs. Payment details are collected directly by Stripe during checkout.
privacyPage.subscriptionBody2: This processing is required to perform the subscription contract under Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR. Stripe may also process data under its own responsibility for legal compliance, fraud prevention and similar obligations.
privacyPage.feedbackBody1: If you contact us through the feedback form, we process your message and, if provided, your email or reply-to address. Delivery is handled through Amazon SES.
privacyPage.feedbackBody2: The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) or Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR, depending on the nature of the request.
privacyPage.processorIonos: IONOS SE for hosting the application server in Germany.
privacyPage.processorAws: Amazon Web Services for Amazon Cognito, Amazon S3 and Amazon SES, configured in this app for region eu-central-1.
privacyPage.processorStripe: Stripe for checkout, subscription management and payment processing.
privacyPage.transfersBody: The IONOS server is located in Germany. AWS and Stripe may process personal data outside the EU or EEA. Where such transfers occur, they are based on an adequacy decision or appropriate safeguards, in particular Standard Contractual Clauses.
privacyPage.retention1: Account and app data are stored until the account is deleted or the relevant content is removed by the user.
privacyPage.retention2: Server logs are stored only as long as necessary for operation, security and abuse prevention.
privacyPage.retention3: Feedback messages are retained until the request has been handled and no further retention duty applies.
privacyPage.retention4: Billing and payment data are primarily processed by Stripe under its own retention periods.
privacyPage.retention5: Browser-side storage remains until you delete it or your browser clears it.
privacyPage.storageBody1: This application does not use analytics, marketing or tracking cookies. It uses only storage technologies that are technically required for the requested service.
privacyPage.storageItem1: sessionStorage for access_token, id_token, refresh_token and pending_email.
privacyPage.storageItem2: localStorage for yield-settings, last_year and a dismissal flag for the storage notice.
privacyPage.storageBody2: To the extent Section 25 TDDDG applies, these storage operations are based on Section 25(2) No. 2 TDDDG because they are strictly necessary to provide the expressly requested telemedia service.
privacyPage.rights4: Restriction of processing under Art. 18 GDPR
privacyPage.rights7: Complaint to a supervisory authority under Art. 77 GDPR
privacyPage.rightsBody: To exercise these rights, send an informal request to
privacyPage.objectionBody: Where we process data based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR, you may object on grounds relating to your particular situation.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.scopeBody: {appName} is provided by {operatorName}. These terms apply to the website, the web app and related features such as registration, authentication, data storage and paid subscriptions.
termsPage.accountBody: A user account is required for protected areas of the service. You must provide accurate information when registering and keep your credentials confidential. You are responsible for activities carried out through your account to the extent you are accountable for them.
termsPage.serviceBody: {appName} provides tools to record, analyse and visualise dividend, yield and goal data for personal use. The exact scope of features depends on the current service description on the website and on the selected Free or Premium plan.
termsPage.subscriptionBody1: Paid plans are processed through Stripe. Binding prices, billing intervals and included features are shown before you complete checkout.
termsPage.subscriptionBody2: Unless stated otherwise during checkout, Premium plans are recurring subscriptions that renew automatically at the end of the booked term. You can cancel through the provided Stripe customer portal, with cancellation taking effect at the end of the current billing period.
termsPage.permittedBody: You may use the service only in compliance with applicable law and these terms. In particular, you may not abuse the service, circumvent technical protection measures, interfere with operations, perform automated mass access without permission, or upload unlawful content.
termsPage.noAdviceTitle: 6. No financial, tax or legal advice
termsPage.noAdviceBody: {appName} provides technical tools for personal finance tracking only. Content, figures, charts and summaries do not constitute financial, investment, tax or legal advice and do not replace professional advice.
termsPage.availabilityBody: We aim to keep the service available without disruption, but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability at all times. We may further develop, adjust or modify the service for legitimate reasons, provided this does not unreasonably interfere with essential contractual obligations toward consumers.
termsPage.liabilityBody: We are liable without limitation for intent, gross negligence and injury to life, body or health. In cases of slight negligence, we are liable only for breach of essential contractual obligations and only for the foreseeable damage typical for the contract. Mandatory statutory liability remains unaffected.
termsPage.terminationBody: You may delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts for good cause, in particular in the event of material breaches of these terms or unlawful use. Any accrued payment claims remain unaffected.
termsPage.privacyBody: Information about the processing of personal data is available in the
termsPage.lawBody: The laws of the Federal Republic of Germany apply, excluding the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. If you are a consumer, this choice of law applies only to the extent that it does not deprive you of mandatory protection granted by the law of your habitual residence.
